meta.title: See AI First — The Opinionated AI Stack Guide
meta.subtitle: Phân tầng từ Nền tảng → Ứng dụng → Xu hướng

layers.name: Nền Tảng
layers.desc: Protocols chuẩn hóa giao tiếp — mọi thứ khác xây trên lớp này

layers.name: Hạ Tầng
layers.desc: Frameworks xây agents + Platforms chạy chúng

layers.name: Trí Tuệ
layers.desc: Memory giữ context · Skills mở rộng khả năng · Orchestration phối hợp

layers.name: Ứng Dụng
layers.desc: Công cụ AI coding và quy trình tạo ứng dụng thực tế

layers.name: Xu Hướng
layers.desc: Những xu hướng đang định hình tương lai AI 2026

cards.name: MCP — Model Context Protocol
cards.desc: Anthropic's connection standard — lets AI talk to any tool, database, or API through one unified protocol. Often called 'USB-C for AI'.
cards.detail:
Agent ↔ Tool communication · The "USB-C for AI" · Adopted by OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Cursor, Replit, Sourcegraph
MCP Apps (Jan 2026): New extension — tools return interactive UI (dashboards, forms) directly in conversation
Skills over MCP: Experimental — skill discovery & distribution via MCP primitives
whenToUse: tool integration for LLMs
connecting AI apps to external data sources
building standardized AI plugins
cross-platform tool sharing
whenNotToUse: agent-to-agent communication (use A2A)
simple REST API calls without AI context

cards.name: A2A — Agent2Agent Protocol
cards.desc: Google's protocol — lets AI agents communicate and collaborate with each other, regardless of their underlying framework.
cards.detail:
Agent ↔ Agent communication · Complements MCP (MCP = tools, A2A = agents)
Agent Cards: JSON-based capability descriptors for agent discovery
v0.3 (Jul 2025): gRPC support, security cards, expanded Python SDK
150+ organizations support · Linux Foundation hosted
cards.note: 💡 Dùng MCP cho tools, A2A cho agents — 2 protocol bổ sung nhau, không thay thế!
whenToUse: agent-to-agent communication
cross-framework agent collaboration
enterprise multi-agent workflows
multi-vendor agent interop
whenNotToUse: tool integration for LLMs (use MCP)
single-agent applications

cards.name: LangGraph
cards.desc: Stateful agent orchestration framework from the LangChain ecosystem. The most widely adopted today.
cards.detail: Open-source framework by LangChain for building agents as stateful graphs. Supports durable execution — agents auto-recover from failures, human-in-the-loop — humans can intervene at any point, and cross-session long-term memory. Used in production by Klarna, Replit, Uber, LinkedIn, Elastic. Includes LangGraph Studio for visual debugging and LangGraph Platform for deployment.
whenToUse: stateful multi-step agent workflows
complex control flow with branching and loops
human-in-the-loop agent approval
long-running durable agent execution
whenNotToUse: simple single-call LLM tasks
no need for state persistence between steps
team unfamiliar with graph-based programming

cards.name: CrewAI
cards.desc: Build role-based AI agent teams with minimal code. Each agent has a role, they coordinate automatically.
cards.detail: Framework for building agent teams using a role-based model — each agent plays a specific role (researcher, writer, reviewer...) and collaborates like a real team. Supports sequential, hierarchical, and consensual processes. Ships with 700+ built-in tools, LangChain compatible. CrewAI Enterprise provides deployment, monitoring, and an agent marketplace.
whenToUse: multi-agent orchestration
role-based AI teams
autonomous agent collaboration
complex workflow automation
whenNotToUse: simple single-agent tasks
non-Python stack
real-time low-latency requirements

cards.name: AutoGen
cards.desc: Microsoft's framework for multi-agent conversations. Flexible architecture, easy to extend.
cards.detail: Multi-agent framework by Microsoft Research that lets multiple LLM agents converse to solve complex tasks. Supports human-in-the-loop, automatic code execution, and group chat patterns. AutoGen 0.4 (2025) is a complete rewrite with event-driven architecture, supporting distributed agents and pluggable components.
whenToUse: multi-agent conversation systems
research prototyping
human-in-the-loop workflows
complex agent collaboration
whenNotToUse: greenfield projects (consider Microsoft Agent Framework)
simple single-agent tasks
TypeScript-only stack

cards.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
cards.desc: OpenAI's lightweight Python SDK — build agents fast with built-in safety guardrails.
cards.detail: OpenAI's official SDK for building agents — lightweight, production-ready. Features built-in Guardrails (input/output validation), Handoffs (task transfer between agents), and Tracing (debug + monitor). Native MCP support since v0.0.7. Minimalist design: few abstractions, easy to customize, easy to debug.
whenToUse: Xây dựng multi-agent workflow nhẹ
Cần handoff giữa các agent chuyên biệt
Tích hợp sẵn tracing và guardrails
whenNotToUse: Cần workflow engine phức tạp
Không muốn phụ thuộc OpenAI ecosystem ban đầu
Cần no-code agent builder UI

cards.name: Google ADK
cards.desc: Google's agent building toolkit — with built-in Gemini, Vertex AI, and A2A protocol integration.
cards.detail: Google's Agent Development Kit — a framework deeply integrated with the Google ecosystem (Vertex AI, Gemini, Firebase). Native A2A protocol support, multi-agent orchestration, and deployment on Google Cloud. Includes ADK Web UI for browser-based agent testing. Gemini models are free when used with ADK.
whenToUse: Xây dựng agent trong Google/Gemini ecosystem
Cần multi-language SDK (Python, TS, Go, Java)
Thiết kế hierarchical multi-agent system
whenNotToUse: Không dùng Google Cloud hay Gemini
Cần framework đơn giản cho single agent
Ưu tiên community lớn và mature ecosystem

cards.name: LlamaIndex
cards.desc: The RAG specialist — connects AI to your private data for accurate answers from internal documents.
cards.detail: Framework specializing in RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and data agents. Strongest at connecting, indexing, and querying data from 160+ sources (PDF, database, API, Notion, Slack...). LlamaIndex Workflows enables building complex event-driven agents. Integrates well with LangChain and various LLM providers.
whenToUse: connecting LLMs to custom data sources
building RAG pipelines over documents
structured data extraction from unstructured text
agent workflows with data retrieval
whenNotToUse: no custom data integration needed
simple prompt-response without retrieval
real-time streaming without document grounding

cards.name: Rasa
cards.desc: Chatbot and voice AI platform — runs on your own server with full data control.
cards.detail: The longest-running conversational AI platform (chatbot, voice assistant) — active since 2016. Focused on NLU (natural language understanding) and dialogue management. Rasa Pro integrates LLMs while still allowing tight control over conversation flows. Ideal for enterprises that need predictable, controllable chatbots.
whenToUse: enterprise conversational AI with strict business logic
on-premise chatbot requiring full data control
multi-channel text and voice assistants
regulated industries with strict data governance requirements
whenNotToUse: quick LLM agent prototyping
team without ML or NLP background
simple Q&A bot without complex dialogue flows

cards.name: Browser-Use
cards.desc: Browser automation framework for AI agents — control the web with Python using any LLM, 80K+ stars
cards.detail: Browser-Use lets AI agents interact with the web like real users — navigate, click, fill forms, extract data. Supports parallel browser sessions, vision models, and custom actions. Integrates MCP server for use in Claude Code/Cursor. Browser-Use Cloud available for production deployment. 80K+ stars, MIT license, simple Python SDK in just a few lines of code.
whenToUse: Cần AI agent tương tác với website
Scraping dữ liệu từ trang web phức tạp
Tự động hóa quy trình web end-to-end
whenNotToUse: Task không liên quan đến browser
Cần API integration thuần túy
Môi trường không hỗ trợ Chromium

cards.name: Pydantic AI
cards.desc: Type-safe agent framework in the style of FastAPI — built by the Pydantic team, supports 40+ model providers
cards.detail: Pydantic AI brings FastAPI's type-safety philosophy to the world of AI agents. Structured output with Pydantic models, dependency injection, streaming, and built-in evaluation framework. Supports MCP + A2A protocols, human-in-the-loop, and 40+ LLM providers. 15.5K stars, MIT license, developed by the team behind Pydantic — Python's most popular validation library.
whenToUse: type-safe structured agent outputs
projects already using Pydantic ecosystem
model-agnostic agent development
agents requiring strict input-output validation
whenNotToUse: non-Python projects
visual or low-code agent building
complex multi-agent orchestration requiring graph workflows

cards.name: Mastra
cards.desc: TypeScript-first agent framework from the Gatsby team — workflows, RAG, evals, and MCP built in
cards.detail: Mastra is a TypeScript-first agent framework, built by the team behind Gatsby.js. Offers graph-based workflows, built-in RAG with vector store, evaluation framework, and MCP client/server. Supports 40+ model providers, human-in-the-loop, and memory management. 22K stars, active development, ideal for TypeScript/Node.js developers who want to build agents fast.
whenToUse: TypeScript AI applications
agent workflows with eval/observability
serverless agent deployment
rapid prototyping
whenNotToUse: Python-only teams
legacy JavaScript without TypeScript
extremely large-scale multi-agent systems

sections.title: Platforms & Config — AI Platforms & System Files

cards.name: Claude.ai (Web)
cards.desc: Anthropic's chat workspace — with memory, web search, Claude Cowork, and team plugins/connectors for enterprise workflows.
cards.detail: Anthropic's primary chat workspace. Features Projects for organizing conversations, built-in web search, cross-session memory, and Artifacts (create code, documents, charts directly in chat). Supports Claude Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5. Extended ecosystem: Claude Cowork is a research-preview desktop agent for knowledge work that brings Claude Code's agentic capabilities beyond coding. Teams can customize Claude with plugins and connectors for specialized workflows, distribute them through private plugin marketplaces, and orchestrate work across Excel and PowerPoint.

sources.title: Cowork and plugins across the enterprise

whenToUse: general AI assistant with projects
research and document analysis
artifact creation (code, docs, diagrams)
project-based knowledge management
Build plugins/MCP connectors for enterprise Cowork deployments
whenNotToUse: automated CI/CD pipelines (use API)
local or offline usage
high-volume batch processing

cards.name: ChatGPT (Web)
cards.desc: OpenAI's most popular AI chat — with GPTs, search, tools, and a built-in memory system.
cards.detail: The world's most popular AI chat by OpenAI with hundreds of millions of weekly users. Features GPTs (custom chatbots), Custom Instructions (personalization), web browsing, DALL-E (image generation), Code Interpreter, and plugin ecosystem. Supports GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, o1, o3. ChatGPT Plus $20/month, Team $25/user/month.
whenToUse: general AI assistant
code generation and debugging
image generation with DALL-E
web browsing and research
whenNotToUse: automated pipelines (use OpenAI API)
local or offline usage
enterprise data isolation requirements

cards.name: Claude-Mem
cards.desc: Plugin that gives Claude Code persistent long-term memory — automatically records experience, compresses intelligently, and remembers across sessions.
cards.detail:
Architecture: 5 lifecycle hooks (SessionStart → UserPromptSubmit → PostToolUse → Summary → SessionEnd)
RAD (Retrieval Augmented Decisions): a new open standard — RAG captures knowledge, RAD captures intelligence
Endless Mode: ~1000 tool uses (vs 50 default), O(N) scaling
whenToUse: Cần giữ context giữa các phiên Claude Code
Dự án lớn cần session continuity và compound learning
whenNotToUse: Chỉ dùng sessions ngắn, độc lập
Cần memory cho non-Claude agents

cards.name: Other Memory Systems

subItems.title: CLAUDE.md (native)
subItems.desc: Bộ nhớ tích hợp sẵn của Claude Code: 4 cấp hierarchy (user → project → local → managed). Import files với @path syntax.

subItems.title: OpenClaw Session Memory
subItems.desc: Per-agent session files + SOUL.md personality. Cross-session nhưng isolated per workspace.

subItems.title: ByteRover
subItems.desc: Self-improving memory layer cho AI coding agents. Unify "vibe-coding" memories across projects & teams qua MCP.

subItems.title: MemGPT / Letta
subItems.desc: Stateful agents with persistent memory — kiến trúc tiered memory (core/archival/recall).

cards.detail: Beyond Claude-Mem, several other memory systems exist: MemGPT/Letta — self-manages context windows like an OS manages RAM, with a paging mechanism. Mem0 — memory layer for LLM apps using vector search. Zep — long-term memory for chatbots with auto-summarization. ByteRover — searches memory from GitHub repositories. Each system tackles a different aspect of the 'AI that remembers' problem.
whenToUse: Agent cần nhớ user preferences qua nhiều conversations
Xây dựng AI assistant có personalization dài hạn
whenNotToUse: Chỉ cần short-term context trong 1 session
Ứng dụng stateless không cần nhớ user history

cards.name: MemOS
cards.desc: Unified memory operating system for LLMs — manages memory via MemCube with short-term and long-term support
cards.detail: MemOS provides a standardized memory layer architecture for AI agents with MemCube — the basic memory unit containing both data and metadata. Supports multiple memory types (parametric, activation, long-term) and integrates with popular frameworks. ~6.9K stars, active development (v2.0.4, Jan 2026). Unique for providing a unified memory interface that Mem0/Zep haven't fully addressed.
whenToUse: Cần persistent skill memory cho agent cross-task reuse
Xây hệ thống multi-agent cần shared memory layer
whenNotToUse: Chỉ cần simple key-value memory
Project nhỏ không cần memory OS phức tạp

cards.name: Universal Agent Skills
cards.desc: Skills are .md files with instructions for AI agents — simple yet effective, runnable on any AI coding tool.
cards.detail: The Agent Skills ecosystem is booming — Anthropic has standardized the SKILL.md format to teach AI agents specialized abilities. Antigravity Awesome Skills (631+ skills, V4.0) is the largest collection, supporting Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Cursor, OpenCode. VoltAgent offers 200+ skills from official teams (Stripe, Cloudflare, Hugging Face, Sentry). Simple setup: npx antigravity-awesome-skills or clone into .agent/skills/.
whenToUse: Khi cần mở rộng khả năng của AI agents với kiến thức chuyên biệt
Khi muốn tạo reusable workflows cho team
Khi cần chuẩn hóa quy trình phát triển với coding agents
whenNotToUse: Khi cần logic phức tạp hơn instructions — dùng MCP servers
Khi cần custom runtime hoặc API integration — dùng frameworks

cards.name: Notable Skill Categories

subItems.title: Engineering & DevOps
subItems.desc: API testing, React components, security blue books, deep research, N8n automation

subItems.title: Cross-Agent Orchestration
subItems.desc: Codex Skill — prompt Codex từ Claude Code. Session handoff giữa CC ↔ Codex CLI.

subItems.title: AI/ML Research
subItems.desc: 77 AI research skills (model arch, fine-tuning, distributed training, inference, MLOps)

subItems.title: Claude Code Ecosystem
subItems.desc: Claude Task Master, Happy Coder (mobile), Claude Swarm, Context Engineering Kit

cards.detail: Key categories: Engineering & DevOps (API testing, Docker, CI/CD), Web Development (React, Tailwind, animations), AI/ML Research (77 skills for paper reading, fine-tuning), Cross-Agent Orchestration (handoff between Claude Code ↔ Codex ↔ Cursor), Claude Code Ecosystem (Task Master, Claude Swarm, session management). Skills are .md files — cross-platform, usable on any AI agent.
whenToUse: Khi muốn hiểu tổng quan các loại skills có sẵn trong hệ sinh thái
Khi cần chọn đúng loại skill cho use case cụ thể
whenNotToUse: Khi đã biết chính xác skill/plugin cần dùng — xem trực tiếp card cụ thể

cards.name: Superpowers
cards.desc: Agent-style skills framework for Claude Code — automatically activates the right skills based on context.
cards.detail: Superpowers is the leading skills framework for Claude Code with 20+ built-in skills: brainstorming, TDD, debugging, code review, git worktrees... Skills auto-activate based on context — for example, the systematic-debugging skill triggers automatically when debugging. Supports subagent-driven development: splits tasks into subtasks, each handled by a subagent then reviewed. Claude can run autonomously for hours without intervention. Install via Claude Code's plugin marketplace. Also supports Codex and OpenCode.
whenToUse: Khi muốn structured software development workflow cho coding agents
Khi cần TDD enforcement và code review tự động
Khi muốn subagent-driven development với review gates
whenNotToUse: Khi chỉ cần quick code generation đơn giản
Khi dự án quá nhỏ cho full TDD workflow

cards.name: Agents (wshobson)
cards.desc: Collection of 112 agents + 146 skills + 73 specialized plugins for Claude Code — the largest to date.
cards.detail: Agents is a production-ready system combining 112 specialized AI agents, 16 workflow orchestrators, 146 skills, and 79 development tools — all organized into 73 single-purpose plugins for Claude Code. Agents are categorized by domain: architecture, languages, infrastructure, security, data/AI, documentation, business operations, SEO. Install individual plugins to optimize token usage. Supports automatic Sonnet + Haiku routing based on task complexity.
whenToUse: Khi cần multi-agent orchestration với specialized domain agents
Khi muốn plugin architecture mô-đun — chỉ load agents cần thiết
Khi cần workflow orchestrators cho full-stack, security, ML pipelines
whenNotToUse: Khi chỉ cần 1-2 skills đơn giản — Superpowers nhẹ hơn
Khi không dùng Claude Code

cards.name: Planning with Files
cards.desc: Markdown-file-based planning skill inspired by Manus — maintains context across multiple work sessions.
cards.detail: Planning-with-files implements a persistent planning model using 3 markdown files: task_plan.md (goals + phases), findings.md (discovery notes), progress.md (progress log). Follows the '2-Action Rule' — after every 2 view/search actions, findings must be recorded. Includes hooks that auto-read task_plan before every write action to prevent drifting from original goals. Inspired by the Manus workflow (acquired by Meta for $2B). Supports Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor.
whenToUse: Khi cần persistent planning across sessions (survive /clear)
Khi dự án phức tạp cần structured task tracking
Khi muốn Manus-style workflow với markdown planning files
whenNotToUse: Khi dự án đơn giản không cần planning phase
Khi đã dùng Superpowers (có planning skills riêng)

cards.name: Claude-Flow
cards.desc: Agent orchestration platform with a Queen + Workers architecture — manages Claude, GPT, and Gemini simultaneously via MCP.
cards.detail: Multi-agent orchestration framework using a Queen + Workers model. Queen (Claude Opus) plans and assigns tasks to Workers (which can be Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini CLI). Features: HNSW vector memory, swarm mode (60+ agents), multi-model routing via MCP, parallel execution. MIT license.
whenToUse: multi-agent swarm orchestration
parallel task execution with Claude Code
complex project automation
background worker workflows
whenNotToUse: simple single-agent tasks
non-Claude environments
lightweight scripting

cards.name: OpenClaw
cards.desc: Personal AI assistant running 24/7 — chat via 15+ channels including WhatsApp, Telegram, Zalo. 314K⭐ on GitHub.
cards.detail: Evolution: Clawdbot → Moltbot → OpenClaw
whenToUse: personal AI assistant always-on
messaging platform automation (Telegram, Discord, Slack)
multi-agent coordination
self-hosted AI with local file access
whenNotToUse: simple chatbot without tool use
enterprise deployment without customization
code-only development workflows

cards.name: Claude Squad
cards.desc: Terminal app for running multiple Claude Code and Codex sessions simultaneously, each in its own workspace.
cards.detail: Tool for managing multiple parallel Claude Code sessions within a single terminal. Each session runs in its own workspace, handling separate tasks without conflicts. Supports Aider integration, multi-workspace management. Ideal when running multiple agents concurrently on different parts of a project.
whenToUse: managing multiple AI coding agents simultaneously
parallel task execution across branches
background code generation
multi-agent development with git isolation
whenNotToUse: single-task workflow
non-terminal environments
projects without git

sections.title: AI Coding Agents — AI-Powered Coding Tools

cards.name: Claude Code
cards.desc: Anthropic's CLI agent — understands 200K tokens, excels at multi-file refactoring. Best for complex projects.
cards.detail: The leading CLI agent — #1 on SWE-bench, outperforming all rivals. 200K token context enables full comprehension of large codebases. Multi-file editing, auto-test, auto-lint. Plugin ecosystem: hooks (pre/post tool use), MCP servers, skills. Runs locally, no cloud dependency. Best for: complex projects, large refactoring, existing codebases. Supports async mode on web (claude.ai/code) — delegate long tasks, create PRs directly, teleport back to local CLI to continue. Extended ecosystem: Everything Claude Code (76K⭐) — production-ready agents, skills, hooks, and commands for Claude Code.
whenToUse: Cần agentic coding trực tiếp trong terminal
Multi-file refactoring với codebase awareness
Delegate task dài không cần giám sát (web async mode)
whenNotToUse: Budget hạn chế (chi phí API có thể tăng nhanh với heavy use)
Cần inline tab-completion trong IDE (dùng Copilot/Cursor)

cards.name: Cursor
cards.desc: Smart IDE based on VS Code — features Composer and Agent mode, best for daily coding.
cards.detail: Smart IDE based on VS Code — AI integrated directly into the editor. Composer mode creates/edits multiple files, Agent mode runs terminal commands autonomously, Tab predictions suggest code in realtime. Semantic search finds code by meaning. Uses Claude + GPT + custom models. Best for: daily coding, rapid prototyping. $20/month.
whenToUse: AI-first IDE muốn context toàn bộ codebase
Multi-file editing và refactoring phức tạp
Developers muốn thay thế VS Code bằng AI-native editor
whenNotToUse: Ngân sách hạn hẹp — Pro $20/mo đắt hơn Copilot $10
Không muốn rời VS Code ecosystem hiện tại
Cần offline coding — phụ thuộc hoàn toàn cloud

cards.name: Codex CLI
cards.desc: OpenAI's CLI agent — runs in terminal or cloud, handles tasks sequentially and precisely.
cards.detail: OpenAI's CLI agent — runs tasks sequentially in an isolated cloud sandbox (safe). Uses AGENTS.md for project instructions. Deep integration with OpenAI models (GPT-4o, o3, codex-mini). Suitable for automated tasks, CI/CD integration, and batch processing. Uses credits from ChatGPT plan.
whenToUse: Cần coding agent tích hợp sâu với OpenAI models (GPT-5.3-Codex)
Muốn setup nhanh với ChatGPT subscription có sẵn
Cần CI/CD automation với GitHub Action hoặc Codex Autofix
whenNotToUse: Cần dùng local models hoặc provider khác (chỉ hỗ trợ OpenAI)
Không muốn phụ thuộc vendor cloud cho coding workflow
Budget hạn chế — cần subscription ChatGPT Plus trở lên

cards.name: Windsurf
cards.desc: AI IDE at $15/month — Cascade Flow architecture, supports multiple models and JetBrains plugin.
cards.detail: AI IDE with Cascade — a multi-step autonomous agent: reads code → analyzes → edits → tests → commits. Has Flows for automated workflows. Supports JetBrains plugin (IntelliJ, WebStorm...). Generous free tier. Best for: developers using the JetBrains ecosystem or needing a budget-friendly option.
whenToUse: Muốn agentic IDE với Cascade multi-step workflow
Free tier rộng rãi — 25 credits kèm unlimited Tab completions
Enterprise cần security compliance docs và hybrid deployment
whenNotToUse: Đã quen Cursor — chức năng tương tự, Windsurf community nhỏ hơn
Cần mature ecosystem — sản phẩm mới hơn Copilot và Cursor
Cascade agent vẫn đang evolving — chưa ổn định cho production critical

cards.name: GitHub Copilot
cards.desc: Microsoft's code assistant built into VS Code — features Agent mode, strong for enterprise.
cards.detail: GitHub/Microsoft's AI pair programmer — integrated in VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim. Copilot Chat for code Q&A, Copilot Agent mode (preview) autonomously handles complex tasks. Biggest advantage: access to the entire GitHub ecosystem (repos, issues, PRs, Actions). $10/month (Individual), $19 (Business).
whenToUse: Đã dùng VS Code hoặc JetBrains — thêm extension không đổi workflow
Ngân sách thấp — Pro $10/mo rẻ nhất trong IDE agents
Teams cần enterprise admin controls và centralized management
whenNotToUse: Cần agentic IDE đầy đủ — Copilot là extension, không phải standalone IDE
Muốn tự chọn AI model — Free/Pro model access hạn chế
Cần offline coding — inference 100% cloud

cards.name: Gemini CLI
cards.desc: Google's CLI agent — up to 1M token context, supports Skills and ADK integration.
cards.detail: Google's CLI agent — free for individuals, 1M token context (the largest). Integrates Google ADK, supports MCP servers, Gemini 2.5 Pro/Flash. Reads extremely large files/folders thanks to massive context. Has extensions for Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive). Best for: projects requiring reading large amounts of code/docs, Google ecosystem.
whenToUse: Cần AI coding agent miễn phí với context window lớn (1M tokens)
Workflow terminal-first, không muốn dùng IDE-based agents
Đang dùng Google Cloud/Firebase ecosystem
whenNotToUse: Cần tab-completion hoặc inline suggestions trong IDE
Muốn dùng models từ providers khác (chỉ Gemini models)

cards.name: Cline / RooCode
cards.desc: Open-source VS Code extension — supports multiple AI models and MCP, community-driven.
cards.detail: Open-source VS Code extension — AI agent running directly in the editor. Supports MCP servers, multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, local models). Cline = original (open-source), RooCode = fork with extra features (custom modes, model routing). Best for: developers wanting full customization, using local/self-hosted models.
whenToUse: Muốn kiểm soát chi phí API và chọn model linh hoạt
Cần autonomous multi-step coding agent trong VS Code
Muốn giữ VS Code workflow hiện tại thay vì chuyển IDE
whenNotToUse: Cần inline tab-completion nhanh (Copilot/Cursor phù hợp hơn)
Không muốn quản lý API keys và chi phí riêng

cards.name: Kiro (AWS)
cards.desc: AWS's spec-first AI IDE — from requirements → design → plan → automated code generation.
cards.detail: Amazon Web Services' AI IDE (preview 2025) — spec-driven development: write requirements → Kiro auto-generates code + tests. Deep integration with AWS services (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3...). Steering files guide AI to follow project conventions. Has hooks that auto-run actions on file changes. Best for: AWS-centric projects.
whenToUse: Spec-driven development — requirements rõ ràng trước khi code
AWS ecosystem — tích hợp Amazon Q Developer Pro
Cần tự động hóa docs và tests qua agent hooks
whenNotToUse: Quick prototyping — spec workflow overhead cho tasks nhỏ
Chi phí credit khó dự đoán — complex prompts tiêu nhiều credits
Không muốn AWS vendor dependency

cards.name: Replit Agent
cards.desc: Cloud-based agent — builds full-stack apps fast, no setup needed. Best for beginners.
cards.detail: AI agent integrated in Replit's cloud IDE — creates apps from English descriptions, auto-sets up environment, auto-deploys. No installation needed — runs entirely in the browser. Suitable for rapid prototyping, learning to code, or when you don't want to set up a local dev environment.
whenToUse: Tạo web app nhanh từ mô tả ngôn ngữ tự nhiên
Prototype ý tưởng mà không cần setup môi trường local
Deploy trực tiếp lên cloud từ browser
whenNotToUse: Dự án cần kiểm soát chi phí chặt chẽ (effort-based pricing khó dự đoán)
Cần chạy offline hoặc trên máy local

cards.name: OpenCode
cards.desc: Open-source coding agent running in terminal — supports all LLM providers, 122K+ stars, MIT license
cards.detail: OpenCode, developed by the SST team, is an open-source alternative to Claude Code with 122K+ GitHub stars (Top 100 repos). Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, local models — no vendor lock-in. Beautiful TUI (Bubble Tea), with LSP integration, session management, and multi-file editing. Written in Go, install via npm/brew/curl. Integrates GitHub Actions for automated PR reviews.
whenToUse: Muốn coding agent OSS với cộng đồng lớn nhất (122K+ stars, 700+ contributors)
Thích terminal-first workflow với TUI chất lượng cao
Cần plan/build agent switching — phân tích trước khi code
whenNotToUse: Cần IDE-native experience — OpenCode thiên về terminal
Không quen cấu hình LLM provider riêng
Cần coding agent ổn định lâu dài — project phát triển rất nhanh, API có thể thay đổi

cards.name: Goose
cards.desc: Open-source coding agent from Block (Square) — doesn't just suggest but also installs, runs, and debugs with any LLM
cards.detail: Goose is an open-source coding agent from Block (formerly Square), written in Rust for high performance. Unlike Claude Code/Cursor: Goose autonomously runs commands, installs dependencies, debugs errors — not just suggesting code. Extensible via MCP extensions, has desktop app + CLI. 33K stars, Apache-2.0 license, supports all LLM providers.
whenToUse: Cần coding agent LLM-agnostic, chạy với bất kỳ provider nào
Muốn tự động hóa workflow phức tạp bằng recipes (YAML)
Team yêu cầu data privacy — chạy hoàn toàn local với Ollama
whenNotToUse: Muốn setup đơn giản, không cần cấu hình LLM provider
Cần coding accuracy cao nhất out-of-the-box mà không tùy chỉnh model
Không quen terminal workflow — cần kinh nghiệm CLI

sections.title: AI Trends 2026 — Trends Shaping the Future

cards.name: Multi-Agent Systems
cards.desc: Multi-agent AI systems working in coordination — Gartner reports 1,445% surge in interest. 40% of enterprise apps will use agents by late 2026.
cards.detail: Gartner reports queries about multi-agent systems surged 1,445% from Q1/2024 to Q2/2025. Predicted 40% of enterprise apps will integrate AI agents by late 2026 (vs 5% in 2025). By 2027, 70% of MAS will use specialized agents instead of general-purpose ones. Agentic AI market from $7.8B (2025) to $52B (2030). Trend: from monolithic agents to orchestrated teams — similar to the microservices revolution.

sources.title: Gartner — 40% Enterprise Apps with AI Agents by 2026
Gartner — Multiagent Systems in Enterprise AI

whenToUse: Cần phối hợp nhiều AI agents chuyên biệt cho workflow phức tạp
Tự động hóa quy trình end-to-end thay vì từng task riêng lẻ
Khi team/org cần agents phối hợp cross-functional
whenNotToUse: Task đơn giản chỉ cần 1 agent hoặc 1 LLM call
Chưa có observability/governance cho hệ thống phân tán
Prototype nhanh — overhead orchestration chưa cần thiết

cards.name: Mechanistic Interpretability
cards.desc: Research into how AI 'thinks' internally — enabling better understanding and control of AI behavior. 2026 breakthrough per MIT.
cards.detail: MIT Technology Review selected this as one of the 10 Breakthrough Technologies of 2026. Anthropic used an 'AI microscope' to discover 34 million features in Claude — from 'sarcasm' to 'DNA sequences'. OpenAI built an 'AI lie detector' based on model internals. Google DeepMind released Gemma Scope 2 — the largest open-source interpretability toolkit. Goal: turning AI from a 'black box' into a 'glass box' — understanding why AI makes its decisions.

sources.title: MIT Tech Review — LLMs like alien autopsy

whenToUse: Cần hiểu internal mechanisms của LLM để debug hành vi bất thường
Nghiên cứu AI safety, alignment, phát hiện deception
Audit model trước khi deploy cho ứng dụng high-stakes
whenNotToUse: Chỉ cần evaluate output quality — dùng observability tools
Không có background ML/deep learning chuyên sâu
Cần giải pháp production nhanh, không phải research

cards.name: World Models
cards.desc: AI simulating the real world — AMI Labs, Google, and startups are racing to develop it. Gaming is a major driver.
cards.detail: AI simulating the real world — LeCun left Meta to cofound AMI Labs, while Google and startups are racing to develop it. World models understand physics, predict outcomes of actions in 3D environments. Applications: autonomous driving, robotics, game development, simulation. Gaming is a major driver. Recent: Genie 2 (Google), video generation models becoming world simulators.

sources.title: Yann LeCun — A Path Towards Autonomous AI

whenToUse: Xây dựng AI hiểu vật lý và spatial reasoning cho robotics
Training agents trong simulated environments trước khi deploy thực tế
Tạo interactive 3D environments cho gaming hoặc VR/AR
whenNotToUse: Chỉ cần text processing hoặc chatbot thông thường
Không có GPU infrastructure đủ mạnh
Dự án không liên quan đến spatial/physical reasoning

cards.name: Generative Coding
cards.desc: AI writes 30% of code at Microsoft, 25%+ at Google. 'English is becoming the new programming language.'
cards.detail: AI writes 30% of code at Microsoft, 25%+ at Google. GitHub Copilot has ~30% suggestion acceptance rate. MIT Technology Review selected this as a 2026 Breakthrough. However, Veracode found 45% of AI-generated code contains security vulnerabilities. Trend: 'English is becoming the new programming language' — developers shifting from writing code to guiding AI to write code.
whenToUse: Tăng tốc development workflow với AI-assisted coding
Non-developers cần build apps/prototypes nhanh (vibe coding)
Cần generate, test, debug code tự động trong pipeline
whenNotToUse: Security-critical code không có human review process
Codebase legacy phức tạp cần deep architectural understanding
Cần 100% deterministic, auditable code output

cards.name: Chinese Open-Source AI
cards.desc: DeepSeek R1 shook the AI world — open-source reasoning model from China. Technology gap shrinking from months to weeks.
cards.detail: DeepSeek R1 caused shockwaves — open-source reasoning model from China, performance near GPT-4 at much lower cost. Qwen (Alibaba) continuously updated, competing directly with frontier models. US-China technology gap shrinking from months to weeks. Trend: China is no longer just 'copying' but 'innovating' — especially in efficiency and cost optimization.
whenToUse: Cần model mạnh chi phí thấp
Fine-tune cho use case riêng
Self-host LLM để kiểm soát dữ liệu
Xây prototype nhanh với model mở
whenNotToUse: Cần enterprise support chính hãng
Quy định nghiêm ngặt về nguồn gốc model
Không có hạ tầng GPU để chạy local

cards.name: Post-Training > Pre-Training
cards.desc: Trend toward post-training refinement instead of building larger models — RL and fine-tuning become the key.
cards.detail: Major trend: instead of training larger models (pre-training costs $100M+), focus shifts to post-training refinement using RLHF, DPO, RLAIF. Fine-tuning becomes the key — small models + good fine-tuning can beat larger models. Reasoning models (o1, o3, DeepSeek R1) prove post-training matters more than model size.
whenToUse: Align model với human preferences
Tăng reasoning qua reinforcement learning
Cải thiện model chi phí thấp hơn pre-training
Fine-tune cho domain chuyên biệt
whenNotToUse: Chưa có base model đủ mạnh
Không có preference data hoặc verifiable rewards
Task đơn giản dùng prompt engineering là đủ

cards.name: AI Drug Discovery
cards.desc: AI-discovered drugs entering mid/late-stage clinical trials. Focus: cancer and rare diseases.
cards.detail: AI accelerating new drug discovery — from 10-15 years down to 2-3 years for the discovery phase. AlphaFold predicts protein structures, Isomorphic Labs (Google) partnering with Eli Lilly and Novartis. Insilico Medicine advancing AI-designed drugs to Phase II clinical trials. Focus: cancer, rare diseases, new antibiotics.
whenToUse: Dự đoán cấu trúc protein
Thiết kế phân tử thuốc mới
Sàng lọc ứng viên thuốc quy mô lớn
Tối ưu thuộc tính dược lý bằng AI
whenNotToUse: Không có dữ liệu sinh học chuyên ngành
Cần kết quả lâm sàng ngay lập tức
Không có hạ tầng tính toán hiệu năng cao

cards.name: AI Infrastructure
cards.desc: Massive 1GW+ data centers, even using nuclear power for AI. A core battleground in the AI race.
cards.detail: Massive 1GW+ data centers being built — even using nuclear power. Microsoft, Google, and Amazon are pursuing long-term nuclear energy deals. AI infrastructure investment is accelerating rapidly. NVIDIA H100/H200 supply remains a key bottleneck.
whenToUse: Triển khai AI ở quy mô production
Tối ưu chi phí GPU và compute
Xây hạ tầng inference gần người dùng
Quản lý cluster training phân tán
whenNotToUse: Chỉ dùng API cloud có sẵn
Prototype nhỏ không cần scale
Không có ngân sách hạ tầng chuyên dụng

cards.name: AI Governance
cards.desc: AI agents monitoring other AI agents — setting safety guardrails and keeping humans in the loop.
cards.detail: AI agents monitoring other AI agents — 'governance agents' detecting policy violations. EU AI Act fully effective in 2026. Gartner predicts 2,000+ 'death by AI' lawsuits by late 2026 due to missing guardrails. 'Bounded autonomy' — agents with clear action limits, escalation paths when uncertain. Trend: compliance-by-design instead of compliance-as-afterthought.
whenToUse: Tuân thủ EU AI Act hoặc quy định AI
Đánh giá rủi ro hệ thống AI
Xây dựng quy trình AI có trách nhiệm
Kiểm soát bias và fairness trong model
whenNotToUse: Prototype giai đoạn rất sớm
AI chỉ dùng nội bộ không ảnh hưởng end-user
Không hoạt động trong thị trường có quy định

cards.name: Langfuse
cards.desc: Open-source observability platform for LLMs — tracing, evals, prompt management
cards.detail: Most popular LLM engineering platform (20K+ ⭐). Provides OpenTelemetry-standard tracing, automated evaluation, prompt management with versioning, experimentation playground, and datasets for fine-tuning. Integrates with 50+ frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI SDK...). Self-hostable, YC W23 backed. Use when you need end-to-end monitoring of production LLM apps.
whenToUse: theo dõi LLM traces và chi phí
quản lý prompt phiên bản
đánh giá chất lượng LLM output
whenNotToUse: chỉ cần eval đơn giản không cần tracing
dự án không dùng LLM

cards.name: DeepEval
cards.desc: LLM evaluation framework like Pytest — 50+ metrics, CI/CD integration, red-teaming
cards.detail: "Pytest for LLMs" with 12.6K+ ⭐. Specialized unit testing framework for LLM outputs: 50+ research-based metrics (G-Eval, hallucination detection, faithfulness, relevancy, RAGAs). Integrates with CI/CD pipelines, automatically detects regression. Includes synthetic data generation and red-teaming for 40+ vulnerability types. Confident AI platform (optional) for cloud dashboard.
whenToUse: unit test LLM output trong CI/CD
đánh giá RAG pipeline
red team LLM application
whenNotToUse: cần full observability platform
không dùng Python

cards.name: Promptfoo
cards.desc: CLI tool for prompt testing, model comparison, and LLM red-teaming/security scanning
cards.detail: Open-source CLI tool (8.3K+ ⭐) for developers to test and secure LLM apps. Configure via YAML, compare outputs side-by-side across multiple models (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama...). Built-in red-teaming for 50+ vulnerability types: prompt injection, PII exposure, jailbreak. Runs in CI/CD via GitHub Actions. Used by 51K+ developers. Ideal for teams needing a security-first approach.
whenToUse: so sánh output giữa các LLM
kiểm tra prompt regression
red team và bảo mật LLM
whenNotToUse: cần production observability real-time
cần tracing distributed system

cards.name: LangSmith
cards.desc: LangChain's observability platform — tracing, evaluation, prompt hub for LangChain/LangGraph
cards.detail: Observability & evaluation platform by the LangChain team. Deep integration with the LangChain/LangGraph ecosystem: full-stack tracing (inputs, outputs, tool calls, decision steps), evaluation framework (automated + human review), Prompt Hub with versioning. Playground for prompt testing and cross-model comparison. Free tier available. De facto standard if you're already using the LangChain stack.
whenToUse: debug LangChain và LangGraph applications
theo dõi agent execution traces
đánh giá chất lượng với annotation queues
whenNotToUse: cần self-hosted hoàn toàn miễn phí
không dùng LangChain ecosystem

cards.name: Arize Phoenix
cards.desc: Open-source AI observability platform — tracing, evaluation, RAG debugging, embeddings analysis
cards.detail: Open-source observability platform (8.5K+ ⭐) designed for experimentation and troubleshooting. Excels at RAG debugging via embedding visualization and semantic drift detection. Built on OpenTelemetry, vendor-agnostic, supports LlamaIndex, LangChain, DSPy, smolagents. Self-hostable via Docker/Kubernetes. Prompt management with version control and tagging. Ideal for research teams and RAG-heavy applications.
whenToUse: debug RAG retrieval quality
phân tích traces với OpenTelemetry
chạy evaluation trong notebook workflow
whenNotToUse: cần cung cấp như managed service cho bên thứ ba
cần license permissive cho thương mại

cards.name: Ollama
cards.desc: The easiest way to run LLMs locally — supports 100+ models, 3 commands to get started
cards.detail: The most popular tool for running LLMs locally (165K+ ⭐, top 50 on GitHub globally). Supports Llama, DeepSeek, Gemma, Qwen, Phi, and 100+ other models. Dead-simple setup: curl install → ollama pull → ollama run. Automatically manages GPU/CPU, quantization, model storage. API compatible with OpenAI format. Runs on macOS, Linux, Windows. Perfect for developers who want to experiment with LLMs on their own machine without API costs.
whenToUse: Chạy LLM trên máy local không cần GPU server
Prototype nhanh với open-source models mà không cần API key
whenNotToUse: Cần production-scale serving với high throughput
Chạy models cần multi-GPU cluster

cards.name: vLLM
cards.desc: High-performance production inference engine — PagedAttention, 2-4× throughput over baseline
cards.detail: LLM serving engine built for production (73K+ ⭐). PagedAttention technology optimizes GPU memory, achieving 2-4× throughput over FasterTransformer/Orca. Supports continuous batching, tensor parallelism, speculative decoding. Compatible with OpenAI API server. Used by major companies for high-throughput serving. Supports most popular model architectures (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, GPT-NeoX...). Apache 2.0 license.
whenToUse: Cần high-throughput LLM serving cho production
Tối ưu GPU memory với PagedAttention
whenNotToUse: Chạy trên máy không có GPU
Chỉ cần inference đơn giản trên local

cards.name: LocalAI
cards.desc: Self-hosted OpenAI alternative — run LLMs, image gen, audio on consumer hardware, no GPU required
cards.detail: Self-hosted OpenAI API replacement (43.6K+ ⭐). Runs on consumer hardware with NO GPU required. Supports text generation, image generation, audio transcription, embeddings — all via OpenAI-compatible API. Compatible with Anthropic API format, Responses API, MCP integration. One-command Docker deployment. Ideal for teams wanting to self-host their entire AI stack on their own infrastructure, keeping data in-house.
whenToUse: Cần drop-in replacement cho OpenAI API trên local
Chạy nhiều loại model (text, image, audio, video) trên 1 platform
whenNotToUse: Chỉ cần chạy 1 model đơn giản — Ollama đơn giản hơn
Cần tối ưu throughput cực cao — vLLM phù hợp hơn

cards.name: LiteLLM
cards.desc: Unified AI Gateway for 100+ LLM providers — cost tracking, load balancing, unified API
cards.detail: Unified gateway/proxy for accessing 100+ LLM providers (39K+ ⭐). Call OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Azure, AWS Bedrock, Ollama... through a single API format. Built-in cost tracking per request, load balancing across providers, automatic fallback when a provider goes down. Manages API keys, rate limits, budget alerts. Python SDK and proxy server for any language. Ideal for teams using multiple LLM providers who need to optimize costs.
whenToUse: Cần gọi 100+ LLM APIs qua 1 interface thống nhất
Cần cost tracking, rate limiting, load balancing cho multi-model
whenNotToUse: Chỉ dùng 1 LLM provider duy nhất
Không cần proxy layer — gọi API trực tiếp đủ rồi

cards.name: Dify
cards.desc: Open-source platform for building AI apps with visual workflow builder and built-in RAG pipeline — 133K⭐
cards.detail:
Dify is an all-in-one platform for creating AI applications from chatbots to complex agents without writing much code. Its core strength is a drag-and-drop visual workflow builder — users drag nodes (LLM, retrieval, tool, logic) to design complete processing flows. Built-in RAG pipeline: upload documents, automatic chunking, embedding, and retrieval — no separate vector DB setup needed. Supports 100+ LLM providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, open-source models), one-click production deployment, and a monitoring dashboard for tracking usage/cost. Real-world use cases: building internal knowledge base chatbots for enterprises, automated customer support, AI assistants for processing internal documents, or rapidly prototyping AI app ideas before investing in custom development. Note: Dify is a broad-scope platform (RAG + agent + workflow), its license has Additional Terms beyond Apache 2.0 — check before commercial use.

Works well with: Ollama (local LLM) · Langfuse (advanced observability) · Milvus/Qdrant (replace default vector DB) · MCP (extend tool access)
whenToUse: Cần visual workflow builder cho RAG và AI agents
Muốn deploy nhanh ứng dụng LLM từ prototype đến production
Team cần platform tích hợp sẵn RAG pipeline, model management, observability
whenNotToUse: Cần license OSS thuần cho multi-tenant SaaS (Dify-OSL có điều kiện bổ sung)
Chỉ cần RAG engine nhẹ, không cần full platform
Muốn stack tối giản, tránh phụ thuộc nhiều service (PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO)

cards.name: RAGFlow
cards.desc: Open-source RAG engine specializing in deep document understanding — smart chunking, grounded citations — 75K⭐
cards.detail:
RAGFlow is a RAG engine focused on document processing quality — the step often overlooked but responsible for 80% of answer accuracy. The system automatically analyzes complex document structures: tables, images, scanned PDFs, slides — and chunks by template with visual preview so users can intervene when needed. Every answer comes with specific source citations (grounded citations), significantly reducing hallucination. Integrated agent toolkit enables not just text retrieval but also external API and tool calls. Real-world use cases: enterprise internal Q&A systems handling contracts, technical reports, legal documents — the kinds of documents where simple chunking yields poor results.

Works well with: Ollama/vLLM (LLM backend) · Milvus/Qdrant (vector storage) · Elasticsearch (hybrid search) · Any LLM provider (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini)
whenToUse: Cần RAG engine chuyên sâu xử lý tài liệu phức tạp (PDF, bảng, scan)
Muốn self-host hoàn toàn với deep document understanding
Cần traceable citations và giải thích kết quả truy vấn
whenNotToUse: Muốn managed cloud service (RAGFlow chưa có official cloud offering)
Cần setup tối giản — RAGFlow yêu cầu Elasticsearch, MinIO, MySQL
Team nhỏ muốn low-code/no-code builder

cards.name: Flowise
cards.desc: No-code tool for building RAG pipelines and LLM apps with drag-and-drop UI — built on LangChain — 50K⭐
cards.detail:
Flowise turns LangChain into a visual drag-drop interface — users drag and connect nodes (LLM, retriever, memory, tools) to create complete pipelines without writing Python code. Each flow can be exported as an API endpoint and deployed with a single Docker command. Supports over 100 built-in integration nodes: from document loaders, text splitters, embedding models to vector stores and output parsers. A community marketplace provides ready-made templates for common use cases. Practical applications: rapid prototyping of RAG chatbots, building internal tools for non-technical teams, or using as a visual debugging tool to understand data flow in RAG pipelines before writing production code.

Works well with: LangChain ecosystem · OpenAI/Claude APIs · Chroma/Milvus/Qdrant (vector stores) · Any LLM supported by LangChain
whenToUse: Cần low-code/no-code builder để prototype AI workflows nhanh
Muốn drag-and-drop UI tích hợp LangChain components
Team ít kinh nghiệm code muốn xây chatbot hoặc RAG pipeline
whenNotToUse: Cần custom logic phức tạp vượt khả năng visual builder
Yêu cầu governance và audit trail nâng cao (cần Enterprise plan)
Muốn deep document processing chuyên sâu (Flowise thiên về orchestration)

cards.name: LightRAG
cards.desc: Lightweight RAG framework based on knowledge graphs — GraphRAG approach from HKU research (EMNLP 2025) — 29K⭐
cards.detail:
LightRAG takes a fundamentally different approach from traditional RAG: instead of relying solely on vector search, the system automatically builds a knowledge graph from documents — identifying entities and relationships between them — then combines graph traversal with vector retrieval for more accurate answers. Originating from research at the University of Hong Kong, the paper was accepted at EMNLP 2025, with benchmarks showing it outperforms many other RAG methods across multiple evaluation dimensions. Lightweight by design, it runs on regular CPU/laptop without requiring a GPU. Practical applications: knowledge management systems, research Q&A requiring understanding of relationships between concepts, or any problem where "who is related to whom/what" matters more than "which text chunks are similar".

Works well with: Ollama (local LLM) · Neo4j (advanced graph storage) · LlamaIndex (see Agent Frameworks) · OpenAI/Claude APIs
whenToUse: Cần graph-based RAG với knowledge graph tự động từ tài liệu
Muốn framework nhẹ, dễ tích hợp vào codebase Python hiện có
Research hoặc prototype cần so sánh graph RAG vs vector RAG
whenNotToUse: Muốn UI quản lý sẵn — LightRAG là thư viện code-first
Cần production platform với monitoring và team collaboration
Team chưa quen concepts knowledge graph và entity extraction

cards.name: Milvus
cards.desc: Largest open-source vector database — cloud-native, scales to billions of vectors, backed by LF AI Foundation — 42.7K⭐
cards.detail:
Milvus is a vector database designed for large scale from the ground up: distributed architecture on Kubernetes, supporting storage and search of billions of vectors with sub-millisecond latency. Offers the widest range of index types among vector DBs (IVF, HNSW, DiskANN, PQ...), allowing trade-offs between speed, accuracy and cost per use case. A graduated project of the LF AI & Data Foundation (Linux Foundation), ensuring strong governance and sustainable development. Cloud version Zilliz provides a managed service. Practical applications: large-scale recommendation systems, image/video similarity search, semantic search for enterprises with millions of documents, or any problem requiring similarity search over large datasets.

Works well with: LangChain · LlamaIndex · Dify · RAGFlow · Towhee (ETL pipeline) · Any embedding model (OpenAI, Cohere, HuggingFace)
whenToUse: vector search quy mô lớn hàng tỷ vectors
hybrid search kết hợp keyword và semantic
multi-tenant production với yêu cầu cao
whenNotToUse: prototype nhỏ cần setup đơn giản
đã có PostgreSQL và chỉ cần basic vector search

cards.name: Qdrant
cards.desc: Vector database written in Rust — fast, memory-efficient, best-in-class payload filtering — 28.6K⭐
cards.detail:
Qdrant (pronounced "quadrant") is a vector database focused on performance and production-readiness, written entirely in Rust for optimal speed and memory usage. Its standout feature is filtering: combining vector similarity search with complex conditions on metadata (boolean, range, geo, nested objects) — and filtering is integrated directly into the search process rather than post-filtering, so accuracy is preserved. Provides both REST and gRPC APIs with SDKs for multiple languages. Practical applications: personalized recommendations with user preference filtering, e-commerce search combining semantic + price/category filters, or multi-tenant RAG systems requiring isolation between tenants.

Works well with: LangChain · LlamaIndex · Dify · Flowise · FastAPI/Express (backend) · Docker/Kubernetes (deploy)
whenToUse: vector search hiệu năng cao với Rust backend
kết hợp filtering phức tạp với similarity search
ứng dụng recommendation và semantic search
whenNotToUse: cần tích hợp sâu với PostgreSQL ecosystem
dự án chỉ cần embedded vector store đơn giản

cards.name: Chroma
cards.desc: Simplest vector database for AI apps — embedded mode, zero-config, ideal for getting started with RAG — 26K⭐
cards.detail:
Chroma is a vector database built with a "developer-first" philosophy — install with a single pip install, runs embedded directly in the Python process with no separate server needed. Stores and searches vector embeddings through a simple API: add documents → query in natural language → get the most similar results. Automatically handles embedding with built-in models, or bring your own embeddings from OpenAI/Cohere/HuggingFace. Featured in most RAG tutorials and courses, it is the "first vector DB" for many developers. Best suited for prototyping, side projects, and small-to-medium scale applications. When scaling to production with millions of vectors, consider switching to Milvus or Qdrant.

Works well with: LangChain · LlamaIndex · Flowise · Dify · OpenAI Embeddings · HuggingFace models
whenToUse: prototype RAG nhanh với API đơn giản
embedded vector store trong Python app
developer cần zero-config setup
whenNotToUse: production scale hàng tỷ vectors
cần distributed high-availability cluster

cards.name: pgvector
cards.desc: Extension that turns PostgreSQL into a vector database — no separate DB needed, uses familiar SQL — 19.7K⭐
cards.detail:
pgvector is a PostgreSQL extension that adds vector storage and search capabilities directly into an existing relational database. The idea is simple yet highly practical: instead of deploying a separate vector database (Milvus, Qdrant...), developers can add a vector column to existing PostgreSQL tables and query with familiar SQL. Supports HNSW and IVFFlat indexing for approximate nearest neighbor search, with multiple distance metrics (L2, cosine, inner product). Especially well-suited for the Supabase ecosystem (pgvector built-in), Neon, and managed Postgres services. Practical applications: adding semantic search to a web app already using Postgres, simple RAG pipelines without extra infrastructure, or when vector data needs to JOIN with relational data (users, orders, products) in a single query.

Works well with: PostgreSQL/Supabase · LangChain · LlamaIndex · Django/Rails/Express (web frameworks) · pgvectorscale (Timescale — performance addon)
whenToUse: đã dùng PostgreSQL và cần thêm vector search
cần ACID compliance và JOIN với relational data
không muốn thêm database riêng cho vectors
whenNotToUse: cần vector search scale hàng tỷ vectors
không dùng PostgreSQL

cards.name: garak
cards.desc: LLM vulnerability scanner – probes security flaws in AI models
cards.detail:
garak is the "nmap for LLMs" – a vulnerability scanner built specifically for large language models, developed by NVIDIA. Tests for hallucination, data leakage, prompt injection, jailbreak, toxicity generation and many other attack vectors. garak operates on a modular architecture with probes (generate test interactions), detectors (identify bad behavior), and evaluators (assess results). Supports scanning models from Hugging Face, OpenAI, Ollama, LiteLLM and virtually any REST endpoint.

Works well with: NeMo Guardrails · Ollama · LiteLLM · Promptfoo
whenToUse: LLM security assessment and vulnerability scanning before deployment
red-teaming LLM applications for jailbreaks and prompt injection
automated probe-based testing across multiple failure modes
CI/CD integration for ongoing LLM security regression testing
whenNotToUse: runtime protection or guardrails (use NeMo Guardrails or Guardrails AI)
non-LLM application security testing
when need real-time blocking rather than assessment reports

cards.name: NeMo Guardrails
cards.desc: Programmable guardrails for LLMs with Colang DSL – dialog control and safety
cards.detail:
NeMo Guardrails is an open-source toolkit from NVIDIA for adding programmable guardrails to LLM applications. Uses Colang – a custom DSL for defining conversation flows, topic control, fact-checking and jailbreak prevention. Supports input/output rails, dialog rails, and retrieval rails. Integrates natively with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and NVIDIA NIM microservices for content safety and topic control. Especially suited for enterprise AI requiring strict control over interaction flows.

Works well with: garak · LangGraph · LlamaIndex · Ollama
whenToUse: topic control and content filtering for LLM chatbots
jailbreak detection in production conversational agents
multi-rail orchestration with configurable policies
dialog flow control with Colang DSL
whenNotToUse: non-conversational LLM use cases (batch processing, code gen)
when minimal added latency is critical
simple output format validation only (Guardrails AI may suffice)

cards.name: Presidio
cards.desc: PII detection & anonymization for text and images – protecting personal data
cards.detail:
Presidio is an open-source framework from Microsoft for detecting, redacting, masking and anonymizing sensitive data (PII) in text, images and structured data. Combines NLP (spaCy, transformers), regex patterns, rule-based logic and checksums to identify credit cards, names, addresses, SSNs, emails, phone numbers and many other PII types. Supports multiple languages and can be extended with custom recognizers. Deployable via Python packages or Docker containers, integrates well with LLM pipelines to sanitize data before sending to models.

Works well with: LangChain · LiteLLM · Guardrails AI · NeMo Guardrails
whenToUse: PII detection and anonymization in LLM pipelines
text de-identification before model training or logging
privacy-aware data preprocessing for RAG systems
custom PII recognizer development with NLP/regex
whenNotToUse: real-time high-throughput stream processing without tuning
non-text PII detection (audio, video) beyond image redaction
when only simple regex-based masking is needed

cards.name: Guardrails AI
cards.desc: I/O validation framework for LLMs – structured output + 100+ validators
cards.detail:
Guardrails AI is a Python framework for building reliable AI applications by running Input/Output Guards that detect, measure and mitigate various risk types. Guardrails Hub provides 100+ ready-made validators including: PII detection, toxic language, competitor mentions, bias, prompt injection and many more. Supports validating structured data from LLM output with automatic reask when output fails to meet standards. Can be deployed as a standalone service via REST API, integrates easily with OpenAI, Anthropic, and any LLM provider.

Works well with: LangChain · Presidio · Promptfoo · LiteLLM
whenToUse: structured output validation and type enforcement from LLMs
composable input/output guards with Hub validators
risk detection and mitigation via validator marketplace
LLM reliability improvement with auto-reask on failure
whenNotToUse: conversational flow control (NeMo Guardrails is more suitable)
LLM vulnerability scanning and red-teaming (use garak)
non-Python tech stacks without REST API bridge

workflow.title: Quy Trình Tạo App — Mỗi bước = Agent(s) + Skill
workflow.note: 💡 Pattern chung: 1 agent hoặc nhiều agent cùng dùng 1 skill — cho phép tái sử dụng skill và phối hợp linh hoạt.

relations.to: A2A = Bộ đôi protocol chuẩn: MCP cho tools, A2A cho agent-to-agent
Dùng MCP để kết nối tools, có thể dùng A2A cho inter-agent
Plugin cho Claude Code · Giữ memory xuyên Quy trình tạo app
Cross-compatible: Claude Code = Codex = Gemini CLI = Cursor
Claude Code nhưng cho OpenAI ecosystem (AGENTS.md ≈ CLAUDE.md)
Frameworks chạy bên dưới Claude-Flow, OpenClaw, A2A agents

values.Filtering: Advanced: metadata filtering, hybrid dense+sparse, full-text BM25, JSON Path Index (100x faster)
values.Deploy: Milvus Lite (pip) · Standalone (Docker) · Distributed (K8s) · Zilliz Cloud

values.Filtering: Rich: payload filtering with boolean (AND/OR/NOT), geo, full-text, pre-filter integrated in search
values.Deploy: Docker · K8s · Qdrant Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) · Hybrid Cloud · Edge

values.Scale: Millions self-host, billions via Chroma Cloud — object-storage tiered architecture
values.Filtering: Document filter (contains / where_document) + basic metadata filters

values.Best for: Teams already using PostgreSQL, hybrid SQL + vector
values.Scale: Scales with Postgres (typically single-node; scale-out needs Postgres clustering/sharding)
values.Filtering: Full SQL: WHERE clauses, JOINs, aggregations — combine vector search with any PostgreSQL query
values.Deploy: PostgreSQL extension — any PG host, Neon, Supabase, RDS, self-host

values.Best for: Full-platform AI apps: agents + RAG + workflow + monitoring
values.No-code vs Code: Low-code: drag-and-drop visual workflow, plugin ecosystem, built-in templates
values.Doc Understanding: Good: hybrid retrieval, configurable top-k, reranking, multi-format support

values.Best for: Deep document understanding, complex PDF/scanned doc parsing
values.No-code vs Code: Low-code: web UI with deep configuration, suited for technical users
values.Doc Understanding: Excellent: OCR, table extraction, layout-aware parsing, scanned documents, hybrid search

values.Best for: Fast visual chatbot prototyping, LangChain canvas
values.No-code vs Code: No-code: visual drag-and-drop canvas, prebuilt templates, fastest setup
values.Doc Understanding: Basic: relies on LangChain document loaders, standard chunking

values.Best for: Graph-enhanced RAG, entity relationships, multi-hop reasoning
values.No-code vs Code: Code-first: Python API (also offers Server Web UI)
values.Doc Understanding: Graph-based: extracts entities & relationships, dual-level retrieval (local + global)

values.Workflow integration: Strong — GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, hooks, PR mode
values.Repo awareness: Strong — repo indexing, CLAUDE.md, memory, sub-agents

values.Workflow integration: Good — agent mode, GitHub PR review, background agents
values.Repo awareness: Strong — full codebase embeddings, multi-file edits

values.Workflow integration: Strong — local CLI + cloud tasks, AGENTS.md, Skills, GitHub PR
values.Repo awareness: Good — repo preloading, AGENTS.md, local + cloud environments

values.Workflow integration: Good — Cascade agent, multi-file changes, auto-verify
values.Repo awareness: Good — codebase analysis, project structure awareness

values.Best for: Inline assist, team adoption, PR review
values.Form factor: IDE extension (VS Code, JetBrains, Eclipse, Xcode, Neovim)
values.Workflow integration: Strong — coding agent on issues/PRs, AGENTS.md, plan mode, MCP
values.Repo awareness: Good — repo indexing, multi-file agent mode

values.Workflow integration: Basic — shell commands, file ops, web fetch, MCP
values.Repo awareness: Good — reads local files, tool-based context
values.Pricing: Free (generous free tier; BYO key for more)

values.Workflow integration: Good — Plan/Act modes, terminal, MCP, Orchestrator (Roo)
values.Repo awareness: Good — tree-sitter parsing, full project read, multi-file

values.Workflow integration: Strong — agent hooks (auto-test, lint, docs on save), spec→design→tasks
values.Repo awareness: Good — structured specs, requirements tracking, persistent context

values.Workflow integration: Basic — integrated deploy, no Git/PR workflow
values.Repo awareness: Basic — project context within Replit workspace

values.Workflow integration: Basic — file editing, shell commands, LSP
values.Repo awareness: Good — LSP-powered code intelligence, project scanning
Good — project context, global MCP servers

values.Best for: Complex stateful multi-agent workflows with graph orchestration
values.Ecosystem: Strong — LangChain + LangSmith + LangGraph Platform, 300+ integrations
values.Graph/Agent support: Strong — Core: directed graph state machine, conditional routing, cycles, multi/hierarchical agents
values.Memory/RAG integration: Strong — Built-in short/long-term memory, semantic search, cross-thread, LangChain retrievers

values.Best for: Role-based multi-agent collaboration with crew metaphor
values.Ecosystem: Good — 24K+ stars, standalone framework, CrewAI Flows + AMP Suite
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Sequential/hierarchical/consensus processes, Flows engine with event-driven control
values.Memory/RAG integration: Strong — First-class: short-term (ChromaDB), long-term (SQLite3), entity memory, RagTool

values.Ecosystem: Good — AG2 community fork (Apache 2.0), ecosystem split with Microsoft path
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Conversation-based patterns, group chat, nested chats, AG2 adds swarm + A2A
values.Memory/RAG integration: Good — Teachability module, RAG via RetrieveAssistantAgent + ChromaDB

values.Best for: Lightweight production agents with minimal abstractions
values.Ecosystem: Good — OpenAI-backed, 16K+ stars, provider-agnostic, growing integrations
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Handoff-based delegation, guardrails, deterministic flows
values.Memory/RAG integration: Basic — Session memory only, no built-in long-term or RAG

values.Best for: Code-first agents with Google Cloud/Gemini integration
values.Ecosystem: Strong — Google-backed, multi-language (also Go/Java), Vertex AI compatible
values.Graph/Agent support: Strong — Workflow agents (Sequential/Parallel/Loop), dynamic routing, A2A protocol
values.Memory/RAG integration: Good — Session state management, MCP tools, Google Search RAG integration

values.Best for: Data-centric RAG applications and document AI
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Workflows 1.0 event-driven engine, AgentRunner, sequential/parallel/loop
values.Memory/RAG integration: Strong — Best-in-class RAG: vector/tree/keyword/KG indexing, LlamaParse pipeline

values.Best for: Enterprise conversational AI with strict business logic
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Flow-based dialogue, CALM combines LLM + deterministic business logic
values.Memory/RAG integration: Basic — Dialogue state tracking (slot filling), no built-in RAG pipeline

values.Ecosystem: Good — 60K+ stars, $17M seed (TechCrunch), MCP server support
values.Graph/Agent support: Basic — Single-agent browser loop, plugs into other frameworks for orchestration
values.Memory/RAG integration: Basic — Session-level browser state only, no memory or RAG

values.Ecosystem: Good — By Pydantic team, 15K+ stars, model-agnostic, Logfire observability
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Dependency injection, agent delegation, multi-agent handoffs
values.Memory/RAG integration: Good — MCP integration, human-in-the-loop, durable execution, external providers

values.Best for: Full-stack TypeScript AI apps (agents + workflows + RAG)
values.Ecosystem: Good — From Gatsby team (YC), 25K+ stars, TS-native, Vercel AI SDK
values.Graph/Agent support: Good — Workflow engine with suspend/resume, agent networks with routing
values.Memory/RAG integration: Good — Built-in RAG pipeline (chunking/embedding/search), agent memory support
